item.title: Contractor reveals deal for Norway operator’s latest subsea move
item.description: TechnipFMC wins contract for Vaar Energy’s Ofelia and Gjoa Nord discoveries

item.title: OneSubsea and Vallourec win orders for 252-million barrel Angola project
item.description: Contractors will provide umbilicals and rigid pipe for Azule Energy's PAJ development

item.title: Sub-Eagle Ford resource nearly tapped out, USGS warns
item.description: US Geological Survey says Bud Limestone nearly dry, a sign that new exploration needed elsewhere

item.title: Repsol to assess Peru’s oil and gas potential
item.description: Company to run studies at Ucayali and Madre de Dios basins onshore Peru

item.title: Wisting returns: Equinor puts Norway's largest undeveloped oil discovery back on menu
item.description: Suspended in 2022, Equinor and partners have improved the costs and solutions

item.title: Baker Hughes lands 'significant' Angola gig
item.description: Subsea trees and control modules destined for Azule Energy's Greater PAJ project

item.title: Bids submitted in decom tender after Petrobras withdraws one FPSO from race
item.description: Brazilian company could reuse P-37 floater hull for revitalisation project in Campos basin

item.title: BP confirms ONGC production enhancement deal covering 43 offshore blocks
item.description: West coast fields — including core assets of Mumbai High, Bassein & Satellite and Neelam Heera — are key to ONGC plans to sustain and expand domestic oil production

item.title: Leading LNG producers urge EU rethink on methane rules
item.description: European Union methane regulations due to enter force in January 2027

item.title: Namibia approves long-awaited Walvis basin deal
item.description: Tower Resources breathes sigh of relief as farm-out agreement is sanctioned by Windhoek

item.title: Next UK Prime Minister unlikely to back North Sea, says Trump
item.description: UK will get new prime minister in coming weeks following Keir Starmer's resignation

item.title: Worley seeks leave to appeal protracted class action ruling
item.description: Australian EPC contractor's bottom line expected to be further hit by Middle East conflict

item.title: No initial damage reported to Venezuela oil facilities after powerful earthquakes
item.description: Epicentres of two powerful earthquakes located about 160 kilometres west of capital Caracas

item.title: Vaar steps up Norway development drive with go-ahead for trio
item.description: Ofelia, Gjoa Nord and Cerisa discoveries will be subsea tie-backs to Gjoa

item.title: Abu Dhabi awards major gas field development concession targeting 1.5 Bcfd production
item.description: The Bab gas cap development would potentially unlock three undeveloped gas-cap reservoirs in Abu Dhabi, with output routed to the new facility being developed by Adnoc Gas

item.title: Abu Dhabi awards major gas field concession targeting 1.5 Bcfd production
item.description: Bab gas project could unlock three undeveloped gas-cap reservoirs, with output routed to new Adnoc Gas facility

item.title: BP advancing next phase of Tangguh LNG
item.description: CCUS is key component of Indonesian gas megaproject

item.title: Top contractors in battle for much-delayed Qatar offshore megaproject
item.description: Workscope involves two engineering, procurement, installation and construction packages for Maydan Mahzam offshore oilfield

item.title: Oil prices slide again on cautious optimism for Strait of Hormuz flows
item.description: Brent, WTI fall more than 4% as ships seemingly navigate critical oil channel

item.title: US oil activity jumps as service firms juggle rising costs amid Iran war
item.description: Dallas Fed survey shows modest gains in oil output, flat natural gas production amid US-Iran war

item.title: US oil activity jumps as service companies juggle rising costs amid Iran war
item.description: Dallas Fed survey shows modest gains in oil output, flat natural gas production amid US-Iran war

item.title: Petronas makes new gas discovery offshore Suriname
item.description: Company expected to make final investment decision on Block 52 later this year

item.title: New FPSO on Murphy's radar after Ivory Coast discovery
item.description: If confirmed as commercial, ultra-deepwater Bubale find could be on stream in 2031

item.title: Second former PM thinktank adds to calls for UK North Sea policy review
item.description: Our Scottish Future has called on the UK government to safeguard North Sea production and jobs

item.title: Murphy on track for Golden Camel first oil this year
item.description: Floating storage and offloading vessel ready for sailaway to Vietnam project

item.title: Modec wins key Mozambique FLNG contract
item.description: Japanese player to supply turret mooring system for Eni's Coral Norte project

item.title: Jadestone boosts Malaysia offshore oil production
item.description: Infill drilling campaign delivers for AIM-listed independent

item.title: UK-based oil and gas company accepts Israeli takeover offer
item.description: Pharos (formerly Soco International) accepts cash offer from Ratio Petroleum

item.title: Saipem selling jack-up rigs to focus on deepwater sector
item.description: Fleet in the transaction covers three owned jack-ups and two leased rigs

item.title: Adnoc closing in on commercial shale oil and gas
item.description: Representatives of the national oil company told industry peers its 10-year path toward unconventionals is almost complete
